# AI Context for @json-express/transport-express

The Express.js transport for JSONExpress.

## Setup
```typescript
import { ExpressTransport } from '@json-express/transport-express';
kernel.registerTransport(new ExpressTransport());
```

## AI Instruction
- Translate JSONExpress generic routes into Express routes.
- Do not write business logic or routing here; defer to the JSONExpress kernel.
